game_info.title: Leo's Fortune Clone
game_info.concept: **Leo's Fortune:** Players control Leo, a sentient furball, navigating 24 hand-crafted platforming levels by using a virtual joystick on the left side of the screen for horizontal movement and swiping up on the right side to inflate, allowing Leo to float or roll faster, and swiping down to deflate for precise landings. The core gameplay involves solving physics-based puzzles by manipulating environmental objects, activating switches, and timing movements to avoid various traps and hazards. The objective in each level is to collect all scattered gold coins, which act as breadcrumbs left by a thief, to progress to the next stage. Upon completing all 24 levels, a Hard-core Mode is unlocked, challenging players to finish the entire game without dying, with Game Center leaderboards tracking fastest completion times for each level.
game_info.description: You are Leo, a sentient ball of fluff on a quest to recover your stolen gold. Navigate through treacherous hand-crafted levels filled with traps, puzzles, and physics-based challenges. Use your unique ability to inflate to float over gaps and deflate to squeeze through tight spaces or gain weight. Collect all the gold coins scattered throughout the path to unlock the exit and reclaim your fortune!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left / Right: Roll Leo (Move horizontally)
Space or Arrow Up: Inflate (Jump / Float / Increase Size)
Arrow Down: Deflate (Drop fast / Heavy / Decrease Size)
Shift: Sprint / Roll Faster
Esc: Pause Game
R: Restart Level
Enter: Start Game

TEST_1.test_description: Verify player movement and basic physics response.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test will simulate holding the RIGHT arrow key to roll the character forward. It will check if the x-coordinate increases over time.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player's x-position should be significantly greater than the starting position after 2 seconds.
TEST_1.description: Verify player movement and basic physics response.
TEST_1.strategy: The test will simulate holding the RIGHT arrow key to roll the character forward. It will check if the x-coordinate increases over time.
TEST_1.expected: The player's x-position should be significantly greater than the starting position after 2 seconds.

TEST_2.test_description: Verify jump/inflation mechanics and gravity manipulation.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The test will simulate a jump command (SPACE) while moving. It will observe the y-velocity and vertical position changes.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player should leave the ground (y decreases) and then return to the ground due to gravity.
TEST_2.description: Verify jump/inflation mechanics and gravity manipulation.

TEST_3.strategy_description: An automated agent will navigate the level by moving right and jumping when obstacles are detected (velocity drops) or gaps appear.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The game phase should eventually transition to "GAME_OVER_WIN" upon reaching the goal.
